title: Argentinian Yogurt Casserole
description: A rich, creamy casserole from Argentina featuring full fat yogurt, inspired by traditional recipes and adapted to be Jain-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C. Grease a 20x20cm baking dish with olive oil.
Chop the onion and garlic. Sauté in a pan until softened, then set aside.
In a separate pan, toast the crushed crackers over low heat until lightly browned.
Stir the brined capers, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper into the toasted crackers.
In a large bowl, combine the yogurt, toasted cracker mixture, sautéed onion and garlic, and chopped parsley.
Transfer the yogurt mixture to the prepared baking dish and top with crispy tortilla strips.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
